sect1.title: Harming Others
sect1.para: Bullying harms others. While the bully or bullies have an intentional plan or purpose in the harming of their target(s), it is the unprovoked component of the bullying process that bewilders the affected person. Bullies are reliant upon their targets’ response of bewilderment because it further arms them with the ability to harass inconspicuously. The harming of others is perpetuated when the bully or bullies seek to disarm others by verbally or physically targeting them within the work environment.
